proposal.hypothesis: Parametric variant of trend archetype trend_supertrend

variants.builder_text:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: trend_supertrend
archetype: trend_supertrend
family: trend
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
  - supertrend(atr_period=16, multiplier=2.0)
  - adx(period=23)
  - atr(period=14)
entry:
  - long: supertrend.direction == 1 and adx.adx > 20
  - short: supertrend.direction == -1 and adx.adx > 20
exit:
  - condition: supertrend.direction changes or adx.adx < 15
risk:
  stop_atr_mult: 1.75
  tp_atr_mult: 2.5
  description: ATR trailing stop (1.75x) and take-profit (2.5x)
constraints:
  - no_lookahead: true
  - only_registry_indicators: true

proposal.hypothesis: Parametric variant of volatility archetype vol_amplitude_breakout

variants.builder_text:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: vol_amplitude_breakout
archetype: vol_amplitude_breakout
family: volatility
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
  - amplitude_hunter(period=40)
  - donchian(period=25)
  - atr(period=14)
entry:
  - long: amplitude_hunter.score > 0.6 and close > donchian.upper
  - short: amplitude_hunter.score > 0.6 and close < donchian.lower
exit:
  - condition: amplitude_hunter.score < 0.5 or close crosses donchian.middle
risk:
  stop_atr_mult: 1.75
  tp_atr_mult: 5.0
  description: ATR stop-loss (1.75x) and take-profit (5.0x)
constraints:
  - no_lookahead: true
  - only_registry_indicators: true
